DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2006 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCE: Betty S. Hsu-Nordstedt, Esq. of Severson & Werson 677-5504 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD MORE PARTICULARITY THAT DEFENDANT IS EQUITABLY ESTOPPED RE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION DISPLACED BY UCC. Order signed in open court. (302/REQ/PB) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
